name: Golden Grilled Cheese
description: A fast stovetop sandwich recipe that is ideal for testing timers, scene checks, and gentle step-by-step guidance.

steps.title: Gather the basics
steps.instruction: Set out bread, butter, cheese, a pan, and a spatula near the stove.
tips: Choose a cheese that melts easily, like cheddar, havarti, or American.

steps.title: Butter the bread
steps.instruction: Spread a thin layer of butter on one side of each slice of bread.
tips: A thin even layer browns better than thick patches of butter.

steps.title: Build the sandwich
steps.instruction: Place cheese between the slices with the buttered sides facing out.
tips: Keep the cheese away from the edges so it does not spill out too early.

steps.title: Toast the first side
steps.instruction: Cook the sandwich in a pan over medium-low heat until the first side is golden brown.
tips: Press lightly with the spatula for more even browning.

steps.title: Flip and finish
steps.instruction: Flip the sandwich and cook the other side until golden and the cheese is melted.
tips: Lower the heat if the bread browns before the cheese softens.

steps.title: Rest and serve
steps.instruction: Let the sandwich rest for a minute, then slice and serve while warm.
tips: Resting briefly helps keep the melted cheese from sliding out immediately.
